name: InstanceRefreshLivePoolProgress
description: Reports progress on replacing instances that are in the Auto Scaling group.

allOf.description: The percentage of instances in the Auto Scaling group that have been replaced. For each instance replacement, Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling tracks the instance's health status and warm-up time. When the instance's health status changes to healthy and the specified warm-up time passes, the instance is considered updated and is added to the percentage complete.
The number of instances remaining to update.
